approval.subject: ✅ Membership Approved — Pally Seba Samity | ID: {{MEMBERSHIP_ID}}
approval.body:
Dear {{NAME}},

We are delighted to inform you that your membership application for Sarberia Pally Seba Samity has been APPROVED!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📋 MEMBERSHIP DETAILS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

  Membership ID   : {{MEMBERSHIP_ID}}
  Plan            : {{PLAN}}
  Issue Date      : {{ISSUE_DATE}}
  Valid Until     : {{EXPIRY_DATE}}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Your digital membership card has been attached to this email as a PDF. Please save it safely — you may need to present it at club events.

As a valued member of our community, you now have access to:
  • All club facilities and programs
  • Cultural and educational events
  • Club library resources
  • Priority registration for special events

We look forward to seeing you at Sarberia Pally Seba Samity!

For any queries, please contact us:
  📞 Phone : {{PHONE}}
  📧 Email : {{EMAIL}}

Warm regards,
{{PRESIDENT}}
President, Sarberia Pally Seba Samity
Sarberia, West Bengal, India

"We unite for a better tomorrow through Education, Health & Culture."

rejection.subject: ❌ Membership Application Update — Pally Seba Samity | Ref: {{APP_ID}}
rejection.body:
Dear {{NAME}},

Thank you for applying for membership at Sarberia Pally Seba Samity.

After careful review, we regret to inform you that your membership application could not be approved at this time.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📋 APPLICATION DETAILS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

  Application ID  : {{APP_ID}}
  Transaction ID  : {{TRANSACTION_ID}}
  Amount          : ₹{{AMOUNT}}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📝 REASON FOR REJECTION
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

  {{REASON}}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

If you believe this decision was made in error, or if you have already made a payment, please contact us immediately with your Transaction ID and we will resolve the matter promptly.

You are welcome to re-apply after addressing the above concern.

For any queries, please contact us:
  📞 Phone : {{PHONE}}
  📧 Email : {{EMAIL}}

We apologize for any inconvenience caused.

Warm regards,
{{PRESIDENT}}
President, Sarberia Pally Seba Samity
Sarberia, West Bengal, India

"We unite for a better tomorrow through Education, Health & Culture."
